cost_validation.skipped: rust probe unavailable in this environment (FileNotFoundError); costs.py is unchanged from the revision validated against src/bin/v1_cost_table.rs; re-run locally with cargo to refresh

refresh_rules.name: no_refresh
refresh_rules.proof: Decoder sees only the selected record stream. Freshness comes only from the replacement cascade: a selected replacement writes new bits at its stream position, so windows touching it re-roll next pass.

refresh_rules.name: equal_size_neutral_refresh
refresh_rules.proof: An equal-size seed record is a legal entry with the same output length; swapping it changes current-layer bits without growing the wire. The swap is an ordinary record the decoder expands normally. Only entries whose content changed since their last search get a fresh swap draw; the swap-alive mass decays accordingly and is modeled, not assumed.

refresh_rules.name: deterministic_entry_permutation
refresh_rules.proof: A pass-indexed, content-independent permutation of the current entry sequence (profile constant; the 3-bit per-pass rule selector is charged). Decoder parses the layer into self-delimiting entries, applies the inverse permutation to the entry sequence, and concatenates. Multi-entry windows get new adjacencies every pass (fresh); single-entry windows are NOT refreshed by permutation because their content is unchanged.

refresh_rules.name: permutation_plus_neutral_swaps
refresh_rules.proof: Composition of the two operators above; charges are the union (3 bits per pass for the permutation selector, zero for swaps).

sweep_summary.refresh_expansion: all rules on record-aligned lanes; no_refresh on chunk lanes (boundary-refreshed, swap-dead)
sweep_summary.recurrence_profile_selection: top bounded profiles plus best representatives for each required sweep axis

dominance_basis: pass 2 must reach target for any 10-effective-pass success
pass 2 is fully fresh (pass-1 literal wrapping rewrote every entry), so it upper-bounds every later, partially stale pass
oracle_weighted_interval is the selection upper bound
max retained variants 16 dominates smaller retained-state caps
equal-size and bloat-retained alternatives enabled dominate disabling either source of retained candidates
permutation_plus_neutral_swaps maximizes computed freshness among decodable operators
uncharged_diagnostic lanes appear in the scan as inadmissible upper bounds only

audit_flags.refresh_decode_story: Composition of the two operators above; charges are the union (3 bits per pass for the permutation selector, zero for swaps).
Composition of the two operators above; charges are the union (3 bits per pass for the permutation selector, zero for swaps).

Decoder sees only the selected record stream. Freshness comes only from the replacement cascade: a selected replacement writes new bits at its stream position, so windows touching it re-roll next pass.

Decoder sees only the selected record stream. Freshness comes only from the replacement cascade: a selected replacement writes new bits at its stream position, so windows touching it re-roll next pass.

experiment_registry.telomere_native_decode_story: Replacements cover whole records; recursive expansion terminates at literals; no discrimination channel needed.
Profile-constant element prefix: flag 0 + 4 verbatim bits, flag 1 + record. Decoder discriminates by the charged flag.
experiment_registry.charged_metadata: 1 charged flag bit per element per layer; flags are wire bits.

experiment_registry.telomere_native_decode_story: Decode-by-replay: decoder parses-and-tests canonical records; a per-fire stuffing bit disambiguates; the decoder reruns the canonical search per fire (decode compute reported separately).
experiment_registry.charged_metadata: Charged per-fire stuffing escapes from the exact Kraft fire mass plus 1 bit per real record.

experiment_registry.telomere_native_decode_story: DIAGNOSTIC ONLY: assumes free record/chunk discrimination; undecodable; always failed_audit. Zero-escape upper bound for the implicit-selector family.
As rechunk_4_explicit_flag with 8-bit chunks (lower flag tax, exponentially fewer hits).
experiment_registry.charged_metadata: 1 charged flag bit per element per layer.

experiment_registry.telomere_native_decode_story: Pass-indexed content-independent entry permutation, inverted after parsing each layer; keeps multi-entry windows fresh.
Equal-size record swaps; ordinary records, wire-size neutral; refresh swapped entries and their windows.
experiment_registry.charged_metadata: Zero metadata; swap-alive mass decays and is modeled.

experiment_registry.telomere_native_decode_story: Increasing per-pass depth; stale windows draw only the incremental seed slice; compute is reported separately.
experiment_registry.charged_metadata: Zero metadata; the schedule is a profile constant.

experiment_registry.telomere_native_decode_story: Encoder emits only the chosen non-overlapping seed/literal records; decoder follows the record stream and needs no selector side table.
Not a viability selector; decoder story is the ordinary emitted stream, but the selection estimate is an upper bound.
experiment_registry.charged_metadata: No selector sidecar modeled, but result is labeled upper bound.

experiment_registry.telomere_native_decode_story: Encoder may keep up to four earned variants per position, then serializes only the selected collapsed path.
experiment_registry.charged_metadata: Working state is compute/memory only; selected records are charged in output.

audit_flags.refresh_decode_story: Composition of the two operators above; charges are the union (3 bits per pass for the permutation selector, zero for swaps).
